name: Double Masters 2022

draft.notes: 16 game cards plus a guaranteed Cryptic Spires dual land and an ad/placeholder card. Structure: ad/placeholder + Cryptic Spires + 2 foils + 2 rares + 3 uncommons + 8 commons. Two rares and two foils per pack. Mythic rate 1/7. Empirical (60 boxes/1440 packs): 2063 common, 677 uncommon, 140 rare/mythic.

statedRates: Mythic rate 1/7. Empirical (1440 packs): 2063 common, 677 uncommon, 140 rare+mythic (87 normal rare, 27 borderless rare, 17 mythic, 9 borderless mythic).
sourceNotes: Double Masters 2022: 16 cards + a guaranteed Cryptic Spires dual land + ad/placeholder card. Two rare slots and two foil slots per pack. Printed in Japan. 24 packs per box. Borderless variants seeded into common/uncommon/rare runs. The Cryptic Spires copy is a fixed extra and not counted in the 16 advertised cards here (cardCount=16 = 8C+3U+2R+1 foil? note: foils are 2; see notes).
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/2x2.json.
